sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ وَفَاءُ مُعَلِّمَةً فِي مَدْرَسَةٍ ابْتِدَائِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Wefaa radi kao učiteljica u osnovnoj školi.
sentences.translationEn: Wafaa works as a teacher in a primary school.

sentences.arabic: تَصِلُ إِلَى الْمَدْرَسَةِ قَبْلَ التَّلَامِيذِ بِنِصْفِ سَاعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Stiže u školu pola sata prije učenika.
sentences.translationEn: She arrives at school half an hour before the students.
She tidies the classroom and prepares the lesson.

sentences.arabic: تُحِبُّ عَمَلَهَا وَتَشْعُرُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ مَعَ التَّلَامِيذِ.
sentences.translation: Voli posao i osjeća sreću s učenicima.
sentences.translationEn: She loves her work and feels happy with the students.
